name: lego_stagewise_deltas
description: Stagewise deltas as raw quantum observables: density matrix, Bloch, entropy, purity, rotation

pytorch.reason: core: density matrices, evolution maps, autograd

z3.reason: verify trace preservation and entropy bounds symbolically

clifford.reason: Cl(3) rotor representation of Bloch rotations

clifford_bloch_rotation.property: Cl(3) rotor matches torch unitary Bloch delta

non_tp_map_trace_violation.description: rho -> rho + eps*I violates trace preservation

identity_zero_deltas.description: Identity map gives zero deltas for all probe states

maximally_mixed_sz_fixed_point.description: I/2 is a fixed point of D[sz]

large_dt_positivity.description: Large dt can break density matrix positivity

weyl_north_pole_coincide.description: At eta=0, L and R are both |0> (coincide at pole)

weyl_pi4_opposite_ry.description: At eta=pi/4, L and R have equal-and-opposite Bloch y
